reviews.comment:
Lerdos para atender el bar.....personal de limpueza demoro mas de 40 min. En higienizar el baño ....no atendio reclamos y encima de muy mal genio...si reconozco buena atención los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
Slow to serve at the bar.....cleaning staff took more than 40 minutes to sanitize the bathroom....they didn't respond to complaints and on top of that were very bad-tempered...I do acknowledge that the beach attendants were good.
